## 🧴 Teen Acne Treatment Options in Katy, TX

### Why Teen Acne Should Be Treated Early

citations.cited_text: Acne is an extremely common skin condition that affects people of all ages. Although teenagers get more than their fair share of acne, the incidence i...
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: Acne is an extremely common skin condition that affects people of all ages. Although teenagers get more than their fair share of acne, the incidence is increasing in children and adults as well — making it the most common skin condition in the United States.

citations.cited_text: Often people are told they will "grow out of it" or to "let the acne run its course," but dermatologists know that treating acne is both safe and effe...
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: Often people are told they will "grow out of it" or to "let the acne run its course," but dermatologists know that treating acne is both safe and effective. With an appropriate treatment plan, scarring can be prevented and self-image can improve dramatically.

citations.cited_text: Teen acne treatment is about early intervention that prevents scarring and builds healthy, lifelong habits.
citations.title: AcneFix® | Acne Treatment in Katy, TX

content.text: Teen acne treatment is about early intervention that prevents scarring and builds healthy, lifelong habits.

### 💊 Common Treatment Options

1. **Topical Treatments**

citations.cited_text: If acne is mild or if a patient cannot take any medications by mouth for various reasons, we may begin with topical medications alone.
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: If acne is mild or if a patient cannot take any medications by mouth for various reasons, treatment may begin with topical medications alone.

These can include:
   -

citations.cited_text: Benzoyl peroxide products to unblock clogged pores. This treatment is a great choice to treat blackheads and whiteheads.
citations.title: Acne | Dermatologist In Katy, TX | Dermatology Associates of Katy

content.text: **Benzoyl peroxide** products to unblock clogged pores — a great choice to treat blackheads and whiteheads.

citations.cited_text: Tretinoin medications to clear pores. Tretinoin is often recommended for severe cases of acne.
citations.title: Acne | Dermatologist In Katy, TX | Dermatology Associates of Katy

content.text: **Tretinoin** medications to clear pores, often recommended for severe cases of acne.
- **Winlevi® (clascoterone):**

citations.cited_text: At that time, she began treatment with: Tretinoin 0.025% topical cream – applied 2-3 nights per week, increasing as tolerated. Winlevi® (clascoterone)...
citations.title: Teen Acne Treatment Success with Winlevi® and Tretinoin in Katy & Houston, Texas — Reena Jogi, MD | PRP Hair Restoration Expert Houston, TX

content.text: Treatment may include Tretinoin 0.025% topical cream applied 2–3 nights per week and Winlevi® (clascoterone) 1% topical cream applied each morning.
2. **Oral Antibiotics**

citations.cited_text: If these are not effective, or if acne is a little more extensive, we often will begin with a combination of topical medications and oral antibiotics.
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: If topical treatments are not effective, or if acne is more extensive, a combination of topical medications and oral antibiotics is often used.
3. **Hormonal Therapy**

citations.cited_text: If this does not work, or if patients cannot take oral antibiotics, in females we may consider hormonal acne therapy.
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: If oral antibiotics don't work, or if patients cannot take them, hormonal acne therapy may be considered in females.
4. **Isotretinoin (Accutane)**

citations.cited_text: If acne is severe, nodulocystic, scarring is present, or patients have not responded to other treatment options, isotretinoin (Accutane) is often cons...
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy & Houston | Village Dermatology Specialists

content.text: If acne is severe, nodulocystic, or scarring is present, or if patients have not responded to other treatment options, isotretinoin (Accutane) is often considered — or when there are concerns about antibiotic resistance.

5. **Laser & Light Therapies**
   -

citations.cited_text: Laser therapy to kill underlying bacteria causing the skin infection.
citations.title: Acne | Dermatologist In Katy, TX | Dermatology Associates of Katy

content.text: **Laser therapy** to kill underlying bacteria causing the skin infection.

content.text: **Photodynamic Therapy** is a "boosted" medical laser light treatment using intense pulsed light and blue LED to treat acne, which targets and destroys acne-causing bacteria and shrinks oil-producing glands.

citations.cited_text: Our BBL for "Forever Clear Acne Treatments" system uses a special vacuum and intense pulsed light to help control sebum production, remove blackheads,...
citations.title: Acne Treatment in Katy, TX | About Face & Body

content.text: **BBL "Forever Clear" Acne Treatments** use a special vacuum and intense pulsed light to help control sebum production, remove blackheads, oil, and debris while destroying acne-causing bacteria, helping to reduce pore size and active acne lesions.
6. **Extractions & LED Therapy**

citations.cited_text: Our approach combines professional treatments (extractions, high-frequency therapy, LED light therapy) with customized product recommendations.

content.text: Professional treatments such as **extractions, high-frequency therapy, and LED light therapy** combined with customized product recommendations are also effective options.
7. **Dermaplaning**

content.text: **Dermaplaning** is a safe and non-invasive procedure designed to address deep acne scars — using a specialized blade to promote smoother skin texture and reveal a radiant glow.

### 🌿 Prevention Tips

citations.cited_text: You should: Exercise regularly to remove toxins and dirt from your body · Practice stress reduction techniques to reduce acne breakouts · Limit or eli...
citations.title: Acne | Dermatologist In Katy, TX | Dermatology Associates of Katy

content.text: Simple tips to help prevent acne breakouts include exercising regularly, practicing stress reduction techniques, limiting greasy foods and dairy, drinking at least 8 glasses of water daily, using non-comedogenic makeup, and avoiding touching your face to limit transferring bacteria.
